options.name: --endpoint
options.description: (optional) If not specified the endpoint will stay the same as project settings

options.name: --name
options.description: (optional) If not specified the botname will be pulled from settings or interactively asked

options.name: --resource-group
options.description: (optional) If not specified the groupname will be pulled from settings or interactively asked

options.name: --verbose
options.description: (optional) show all commands as they are executed
